message.content:
# AI-Powered Review Replies

## AI Automatically Replies to Every Google Review

### How It Works
- ⭐ New Google review posted (5★ or less)
- 🤖 AI reads the review content + star rating
- 🧠 Generates a personalized, on-brand reply
- ✅ Posted automatically — or sent for approval first
- ⏰ Replies posted within minutes, not days

### Fully Customizable Per Client
- 🎨 **Custom Brand Voice**  
  Set tone: professional, friendly, casual, luxury — the AI writes in your client's style every time.
- 🌐 **Language & Market**  
  Configure replies in any language to match your client's customer base.
- 📊 **Smart Reply Rules**  
  Different response templates for 5★, 4★, and 3★ or below — each handled appropriately.
- 👤 **Owner Approval Mode**  
  Every reply can be sent for review before posting — full control, no surprises.
- 📋 **Business-Specific Info**  
  AI references the business name, services, team, location — never sounds generic.
